title: NoOres
description: This texture pack replaces the textures of ores and blocks like granite, andesite etc with stone or deepslate to blend them in
body: This pack hides ores by replacing them with their respective deepslate or stone counterpart. It will additionally remove andesite, granite, diorite etc with stone, and tuff with deepslate, and remove texture rotations. This is inteded to help with hiding bases from people using ore pattern or texture rotation reversal.
